posts.text: Few countries were ready for the oil shock caused by Israel and America’s war with Iran. Brazil was https://www.economist.com/the-americas/2026/03/26/brazil-has-a-secret-weapon-against-oil-shocks?taid=69c6e67ad12de60001c6910a&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
IRAN ON US PEACE TALK HEADLINES:

"They’ve spammed so much fake news trying to push energy prices down that the market is just numb now. Keep going, nobody is buying it anymore. The real prices will show up anyway. Powerful? Maybe. But Smart? Not even close. Burned that fake news card way too early."
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
